repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.dart-flutter: pubspec dependencies, widget tree and setState lifecycle, Dart Futures and Streams and isolates, flutter build, and platform channels
plain prose note with no repository or domain signal

retrieval_query: dart flutter pubspec widget tree state setState build method Future Stream async isolate platform channel hot reload dispose const widget

validation_smoke.name: code.dart-flutter L3 validation smoke
signals: flutter pub get resolves from pubspec.lock and flutter test passes
a widget test pumps the widget and asserts the UI after a state change
expensive work runs in an isolate or off the build method, keeping frames under budget
controllers/streams created by a State are disposed in dispose()

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.dart-flutter diagnosis smoke
signals: setState mutating state but rebuilding the wrong subtree or doing heavy work in build
a controller/stream/animation not disposed, leaking across navigation
blocking or CPU-heavy work on the UI isolate causing dropped frames (jank)
platform-channel call assuming a feature exists on a platform that lacks it
rebuilding the whole tree on every change because state sits too high or widgets are non-const
